updates.title: New Library System
updates.description: All purchased items are now automatically saved to your Library. You can activate, deactivate, or delete them as you wish.

updates.title: Buy One Get One Free!
updates.description: Every time you buy a gift in the shop, a bonus surprise gift is automatically added to your library for free!

updates.title: Expanded Gift Selection
updates.description: Added new items like the Golden Chest, Lucky Clover, Party Popper, and the legendary Diamond Box.

updates.title: Return to Shop
updates.description: Deleting an item from your library now makes it available in the shop again, allowing you to repurchase it later.

updates.title: Improved Navigation
updates.description: The Library icon in the navigation bar now leads directly to your personal inventory of items and skins.
